ddls:
CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the survey */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the survey */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the survey */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the survey */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the survey (e.g., active, inactive, draft) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the survey */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the last user who modified the survey */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last modification */,
  "survey_type" TEXT /* Type of the survey (e.g., user opinion, market trend) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the question belongs to */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of question (e.g., multiple-choice, open-ended) */,
  "required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the question is required */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the question within the survey */,
  "additional_info" TEXT /* Additional information or context for the question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the response is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who responded */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Text of the response */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the response was submitted */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who submitted the response */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user who submitted the response */,
  "response_status" TEXT /* Status of the response (e.g., completed, incomplete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response being classified */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label assigned to the response (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the classification */,
  "classified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who classified the response */,
  "classification_date" TEXT /* Date the response was classified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classifications_classified_by FOREIGN KEY ("classified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classifications_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "politics_scores" (
  "politics_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each politics score */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response being scored */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score assigned to the response (e.g., -10 to 10) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the politics score */,
  "scored_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who scored the response */,
  "scoring_date" TEXT /* Date the response was scored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("politics_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_politics_scores_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_politics_scores_scored_by FOREIGN KEY ("scored_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economics" (
  "economics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic label */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response being labeled */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label assigned to the response (e.g., bullish, bearish, neutral) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the economic label */,
  "labeled_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who labeled the response */,
  "labeling_date" TEXT /* Date the response was labeled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("economics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economics_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economics_labeled_by FOREIGN KEY ("labeled_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "governance" (
  "governance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each governance label */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response being labeled */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label assigned to the response (e.g., decentralized, centralized) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the governance label */,
  "labeled_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who labeled the response */,
  "labeling_date" TEXT /* Date the response was labeled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("governance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_governance_labeled_by FOREIGN KEY ("labeled_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_governance_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submitted_at" (
  "submitted_at_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission date */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response being submitted */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the response was submitted */,
  "submission_source" TEXT /* Source of the submission (e.g., web, mobile app) */,
  "submission_method" TEXT /* Method of submission (e.g., form, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submitted_at_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submitted_at_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id")
)
